ai_models.label: AI Models & Updates
ai_models.query: "GPT-5" OR "GPT-5.5" OR "GPT-6" OR "ChatGPT 5" OR "ChatGPT-5" OR "ChatGPT 6" OR "o3-pro" OR "o4" OR "o5" OR "Claude Opus 4" OR "Claude Opus 5" OR "Claude Sonnet 5" OR "Claude Haiku 5" OR "Claude 4.6" OR "Claude 4.7" OR "Claude 5" OR "Gemini 3" OR "Gemini 4" OR "Gemini Ultra" OR "Gemini Turbo" OR "Gemini Pro" OR "Llama 4" OR "Llama 5" OR "Grok 4" OR "Grok 5" OR "Grok 6" OR "Qwen3" OR "Qwen 3.5" OR "Qwen 4" OR "DeepSeek V3" OR "DeepSeek V4" OR "DeepSeek R1" OR "DeepSeek R2" OR "Kimi K2" OR "Kimi K3" OR "MiniMax M2" OR "MiniMax M3" OR "Mistral Large" OR "Mistral Medium" OR "Phi-4" OR "Phi 5" OR "Nemotron" OR "Command R" OR "Stable Diffusion 4" OR "new AI model release" OR "foundation model launch" OR "open-source LLM"

ai_business_dynamics.label: AI Startup Deals & Funding
ai_business_dynamics.query: ("AI startup" OR "AI company" OR "AI firm" OR OpenAI OR Anthropic OR xAI OR "Safe Superintelligence" OR SSI OR "Thinking Machines" OR Cursor OR Anysphere OR Windsurf OR Perplexity OR Glean OR Harvey OR Sierra OR Hebbia OR Cohere OR Mistral OR Runway OR HeyGen OR Replit OR Pika OR Suno OR Synthesia OR "Figure AI" OR "Physical Intelligence" OR "World Labs" OR "Groq" OR "Cerebras") (funding OR raised OR "funding round" OR "Series A" OR "Series B" OR "Series C" OR "Series D" OR "Series E" OR IPO OR SPAC OR "public offering" OR acquisition OR acquires OR "acquired by" OR merger OR "M&A" OR unicorn OR valuation OR deals OR "tender offer" OR "secondary sale" OR "venture capital")

datacenter_deals.label: Datacenter & CSP & Capex
datacenter_deals.query: (AWS OR "Amazon Web Services" OR Azure OR "Microsoft Azure" OR "Google Cloud" OR GCP OR "Oracle Cloud" OR Microsoft OR Amazon OR Alphabet OR Google OR Meta OR "hyperscaler") (capex OR "capital expenditure" OR "data center" OR datacenter OR "AI infrastructure" OR "cloud capex" OR "cloud spending" OR "campus expansion" OR "new data center" OR "data center construction" OR "data center lease" OR "data center build" OR "GPU cluster" OR "AI factory" OR "AI cluster")

datacenter_neocloud.label: Neocloud & Deals
datacenter_neocloud.query: (CoreWeave OR Lambda OR "Lambda Labs" OR "Crusoe Energy" OR Crusoe OR Vultr OR "Applied Digital" OR TeraWulf OR "Iris Energy" OR IREN OR "Core Scientific" OR Hut8 OR "Hut 8" OR "Bit Digital" OR "Cipher Mining" OR "Hive Digital" OR "HIVE Blockchain" OR Nebius OR Fluidstack OR "Northern Data" OR "neocloud" OR "GPU cloud") (deal OR lease OR order OR contract OR "GPU contract" OR construction OR expansion OR financing OR "debt financing" OR "equity raise" OR "secured order" OR "new campus" OR "power purchase agreement" OR PPA OR "customer contract" OR "hyperscaler deal")

datacenter_cooling.label: Datacenter Cooling
datacenter_cooling.query: "data center" cooling OR "liquid cooling" OR "immersion cooling" OR "direct-to-chip" OR "rear door" heat OR "cooling infrastructure" OR Vertiv OR Schneider OR CoolIT OR "thermal management" datacenter

ai_power.label: AI Power & Energy
ai_power.query: "AI power" OR "data center" power deal OR PPA OR nuclear OR "small modular reactor" OR "natural gas" AI OR "grid capacity" OR "power purchase" datacenter OR Vistra OR Constellation OR NRG OR "energy infrastructure" AI OR transformer utility OR "electricity demand" AI

gpu_datacenter.label: GPU Datacenter (NVIDIA)
gpu_datacenter.query: NVIDIA "data center" OR "H100" OR "H200" OR "B100" OR "B200" OR "GB200" OR "Rubin" OR "Blackwell" OR "NVLink" OR "NVSwitch" OR "DGX" OR "HGX" OR "SuperPOD" OR "InfiniBand" OR "Spectrum-X" OR "liquid cooling" NVIDIA

asic_market.label: ASIC & Custom Silicon
asic_market.query: "custom chip" AI OR "Google TPU" OR "AWS Trainium" OR "AWS Inferentia" OR Broadcom ASIC OR Marvell ASIC OR "custom silicon" OR "AI accelerator" OR "inference chip" OR "training chip" custom OR "Microsoft Maia" OR "Meta MTIA"

supply_memory.label: Supply Chain: Memory (DRAM/HBM/NAND)
supply_memory.query: "DRAM price" OR "NAND price" OR "HBM" supply OR shortage OR "memory price" OR "DDR5 price" OR "HBM4" OR "HBM3e" OR Samsung DRAM OR "SK Hynix" HBM

supply_interconnect.label: Supply Chain: Interconnect & Optical
supply_interconnect.query: "optical interconnect" OR "silicon photonics" OR "co-packaged optics" OR CXL OR "AI networking" OR InfiniBand OR "800G" OR "1.6T" OR Broadcom networking OR Arista

supply_packaging.label: Supply Chain: Advanced Packaging
supply_packaging.query: CoWoS OR "advanced packaging" OR "chip packaging" OR "2.5D" OR "3D packaging" OR "chiplet" OR "interposer" OR TSMC packaging OR ASE OR "fan-out"

supply_foundry.label: Foundry & Semi Equipment
supply_foundry.query: TSMC OR "Samsung foundry" OR "Intel foundry" OR "GlobalFoundries" OR UMC OR SMIC OR Rapidus foundry OR "fab capacity" OR "wafer start" OR "process node" OR "2nm" OR "3nm" OR ASML OR "Tokyo Electron" OR "Applied Materials" OR "Lam Research" OR "KLA Corporation" OR "EUV lithography"

supply_materials.label: Supply Chain: Materials & Chemicals
supply_materials.query: "rare earth" semiconductor OR "neon gas" OR photoresist OR "JSR" OR "Shin-Etsu" OR "SUMCO" OR "silicon wafer" supply OR "specialty chemical" chip OR "semiconductor material"

supply_labor.label: Supply Chain: Labor & Construction
supply_labor.query: "data center" electrician OR construction OR labor shortage OR "semiconductor workforce" OR "chip engineer" OR "fab construction" OR "skilled worker" semiconductor

semi_earnings.label: Semi Company Earnings
semi_earnings.query: NVIDIA OR AMD OR Micron OR "SK Hynix" OR Samsung OR Intel OR TSMC OR Broadcom OR Qualcomm OR "Texas Instruments" earnings OR revenue OR guidance OR "beat estimates"

taiwan_semi_en.label: Taiwan Semi (English)
taiwan_semi_en.query: MediaTek OR UMC OR "ASE Technology" OR "Hon Hai" OR Foxconn semiconductor OR "Taiwan chip" OR "Taiwan semiconductor industry" OR "Taiwan MOEA" semiconductor OR "Taiwan CHIPS"

taiwan_semi_tw.label: Taiwan Semi (Chinese)
taiwan_semi_tw.query: 台積電 OR 聯發科 OR 日月光 OR 聯電 OR 半導體 OR 先進封裝

japan_semi_en.label: Japan Semi (English)
japan_semi_en.query: Rapidus OR "Tokyo Electron" OR Renesas OR Kioxia OR "Japan semiconductor" OR "Disco Corporation" OR "Screen Holdings"

japan_semi_jp.label: Japan Semi (Japanese)
japan_semi_jp.query: ラピダス OR 東京エレクトロン OR ルネサス OR キオクシア OR 半導体 OR ディスコ

korea_semi_en.label: Korea Semi (English)
korea_semi_en.query: Samsung Electronics chip OR "SK Hynix" foundry OR "Korea semiconductor" policy OR Gyeonggi fab OR "Yongin cluster" OR "Korean chip exports"

korea_semi_kr.label: Korea Semi (Korean)
korea_semi_kr.query: 삼성전자 반도체 OR SK하이닉스 OR DRAM OR HBM OR 파운드리

regulation_ai.label: Regulation: AI Policy
regulation_ai.query: "AI regulation" OR "AI policy" OR "AI safety" legislation OR "executive order" OR "AI governance" OR "AI ethics" law
